description: Format-hardened metadata-only Safetensors header parser (5 binding format defects closed) plus a FRESH live reconciliation against the same pinned immutable artifact. Aggregate-only: counts, booleans, public architecture shapes; no tensor names, URLs, response headers, caches, or local paths. Supersedes the prior header-gate run's shape/format evidence.

format_defects_closed.defect_1_shape_dtype_bound_to_span: end-start == element_count(shape) * dtype_size under a frozen byte-aligned dtype table; scalars=1 element, empty=0 bytes; sub-byte dtypes fail closed
format_defects_closed.defect_2_complete_hole_free_coverage: nonempty spans must tile [0, data_region) exactly: first starts at 0, each next at prior end, final end == data_region; no leading/intermediate/trailing holes or overlaps
format_defects_closed.defect_3_duplicate_keys_rejected: object_pairs_hook rejects duplicate tensor names / record fields / metadata entries at every level
format_defects_closed.defect_4_grammar_enforced: first byte '{'; only trailing ASCII-space padding; __metadata__ is string->string; each record has exactly {dtype,shape,data_offsets}; nonempty names != reserved key
format_defects_closed.defect_5_booleans_rejected: strict type(x) is int for every dimension/offset/length/declared-size; booleans fail closed

remaining_header_gate_provenance.explicit_range_status_verification: a raw ranged fetcher must assert HTTP 206 + exact Content-Range and reject redirects to mutable identities (the HfFileSystem-based fetch performs ranged reads at the pinned revision but does not expose per-response status/Content-Range for assertion)
remaining_header_gate_provenance.immutable_per_shard_oid_binding: bind each shard to its immutable Hub/LFS OID (not only declared size) before fetching header bytes

other_open_phase0_gates: packed(source)<->numbered(artifact) expert representation map + source<->index module-set equality
one production-path final conjunction with self-binding/provenance failure tests
weight staging (still prohibited before a genuine pass)
privacy: aggregate-only; no tensor names, URLs, response headers, weights, caches, or local paths
